target: 12. Many Sacrifices
Shinpei Ajiro
Hello... I'm tired of waiting for you.
Step back... Shin-chan... It's dangerous...
What about Mio and Sou!? What happened!?
As expected... you came to Mio-chan. Shinpei-kun!
I said step back, Shin-chan. I'll do it.
Rather than me... wouldn't it be better to kill Shinpei-kun for him, Mio-chan?
I sent Mio-chan and Sou-kun to Hiruko Cave. Mother is probably eating them right about now.
You were just a bit too late! Shinpei-kun!
...You've got some nerve, Shide... Waiting here all alone instead of running away...
I can't leave this to the other shadows... I don't want to lose any more comrades, you see... Since I'm human, I won't be hacked.
…What!?
(He's afraid of being hacked? This guy... does he think Ushio is still alive...!?)
(Wait... wait a second!! If he thinks she's alive, I should let him keep thinking that...!!)
So you saw right through it...
...Mio-chan. Hurry up and kill Shinpei-kun to make him loop. Otherwise it'll be too la--
...Ah, I see...
If we loop, I'll just come back to life anyway...
You talk too much.
(We killed Karikiri... Shide, but...! I have to go save Mio, Sou, and Nagumo-sensei)
What's wrong?
Shin-chan. What he said was true.
Just now... Mio died.
...You can tell!?
I can tell by feeling. When the real one dies.
...Damn it!!!
(Mio... And surely Sou too...)
If we're going back... should I kill you?
…No, not yet…
I need to grasp the situation... Check his memories!
Got it.
...Huh?
…What's wrong?
...Something's wrong. This guy... has no memories...
What do you mean!?
It's empty. He doesn't even have the memory of talking with us... from just a moment ago.
What is this... How was he even moving...?
There are two Shides... Not shadows, but two humans... like clones.
This guy definitely didn't have burns on his hands. Then the other one is...
He must be with Nagumo-sensei...!
(I can't imagine Sensei is safe either. Haine called from her phone...)
Shin-chan, over here!
(Toki-chan collapsed... She has terrible wounds...!)
Toki-chan!!!
...Thank goodness. You're alive... Shinpei-san.
...I searched for Mio's presence... and m-made it this far...
Tokiko... what happened?
Nezu-san and Totsumura-san... they... let me escape...
Please... Head to Torashima... to Torashima...!! Ryunosuke-san is... fighting Shide...!!
Save Ryunosuke-san... please...
…She's dead…
(Toki-chan...)
Shin-chan, this is Tokiko's memory...
(From Shide's attack, Rosencrantz was... in an instant...)
Let's hurry! To Torashima...!!
Hm? This is...
(Dr. Hishigata's handgun...!! Toki-chan had it. There's still one bullet left...)
*Pant*... *pant*...
Shin-chan!
(What do I do... should I go to Torashima?)
...Alright.
"Don't go"
"Let's go"
...I'm not going!
Sensei and Ryunosuke-san are probably already dead. I couldn't tell for sure from Toki-chan's memories...
But I don't have time to go and confirm it...!!
The only thing that's certain is that Mio died... The Event Horizon is approaching. If I don't hurry, Mio's death will become fixed...!!
Right now, I might still be able to save "both" of them...!!
If I loop right now, I think I can return to around 10:10. Right when we were coming down Mt. Takanosu with the kids...
You can see the time you'll return to!?
Yeah... vaguely, though.
But at 10:10, Haine calling Mio and Sensei can't be stopped anymore.
I have to hurry down the mountain even faster, and stop Mio and the others from coming to the field...!!
Once I loop, I'll rush back to Kofune and save you.
Then I'll quickly catch up to Mio and Sou and stop them. There won't be time for detailed explanations after I return.
Just follow me without asking questions. I'll save both Mio and Nagumo-sensei.
It's a race against time... then.
...Then, I'm off.
KEY TIPS[<color=#GF_KEY_LOOPEND_08>8th END</color>] was obtained.
...Let's go! To Torashima.
(It's too early to go back...! I need to gather as much information on the enemy as possible first!)
Shin-chan?
Yeah, let's hurry!
*Pant*... *pant*... *pant*...!
Totsumura-san, please run away!
B-But...!
Ryunosuke-kun is right. Put down that dangerous thing, and hole up in the police box...
If you do that, you can spend a little more time in peace. Only until tomorrow night, though.
Are you fine with following after them?
Sister... Nezu-san...
I want to run... I really do!! B-But I can't just do that...! As a Champion of Justice...!
Good grief, why don't you learn that a half-baked sense of justice will destroy you...?
...Totsumura-san, Ryunosuke-san. You're safe...!
(Sensei... Nezu-san... I didn't make it in time... damn it!!)
Finally making your appearance, Shinpei-kun. You're late...
I've been thoroughly entertained over here.

Shide…!
…Haine…
Hm... So you know what happened here from Tokiko's memories.
Shin-chan…
I know...! We're just getting information, we won't push it.
My, my, since you came all this way, why don't you stay and play a little longer--
Guh?!
You're looking away too much, Shide.
Tch…!
...Come to think of it, you were still here. Both sister and brother have such bad habits...!
(Ryunosuke-san's attacks are working! ...Wait a second!?)
(Looking closely, Shide's armor seems to be a little thinner...!)
(In Toki-chan's memories, it looked like Ryunosuke-san was born from the mud--)
(I see...! He hacked Shide's armor and used it as material to materialize)
(Which means, Shide's armor is thinner than before...!)
(I'll give Totsumura-san the gun I brought.)
(Other weapons are Ryunosuke-san's hammer and Mio's kitchen knife... huh)
(Nezu-san's rifle, and that spear-like thing Shide has...)
(...If we can pull this off...!)
Shin-chan… what do we do?
Mio… change of plans.
...We're taking down Shide here!
(Right now... we might be able to win!)
(If we secure a victory, should I loop and use it for the next time...? No, I can think about that later.)
Mio, we're settling this quickly...! Leave enough time to loop, but focus on defeating them for now.
Understood.
Please use this, Totsumura-san.
I-Is this the handgun I returned to Tokiko-chan? I... I'll do it...!
So you're determined to settle this here. Shide...
To think you can beat us. Are you failing to see the big picture?
Then I'll end this for you.
(Mio, Ryunosuke-san, Totsumura-san...!)
Let's go!!!
Shide!! Mio's movements are a decoy!!
...I know!
Shide!!!
(...Nice! He's attacking with a perfect time lag that makes it hard for Haine to give instructions!)
Totsumura-san!
W-what?!
We'll take on Haine!
B-But... This can only be loaded with two shots.
Just stalling Haine for a little while is enough!
Eeeeeh!?
Please!!
A-Alright!
(I'm counting on you, Totsumura-san!)
Haine! Your opponent is meeeeeeee!!
Nuh!?
(Now!)
(I picked up the rifle! With this--)
You insolent...
Mio! Get Haine!
Goodbye, Mother.
Tchhhhh! You defective product!
(Calm down, look at the big picture.)
(Mio from Haine's front)
(Totsumura-san from behind)
(And me from the side)
(The action Haine will take from here is...)
(To dodge Mio's attack, backwards... no, that's not it.)
(To avoid Totsumura-san's gun, duck... no, that's not it.)
(The remaining option is... up, the sky!!)
Huh!? She turned into a crow!?
(Right, she'll turn into a crow and escape...)
Shide, I'm retreating for now!
(Then I just need to finish her off...)
Ngih!!
Haine!!?
It just grazed her!
Shinpei Ajiro! I'll definitely kill you!!
(Damn, I let her get away!)
Good grief, you really pull all sorts of stunts, don't you?
Do you have the luxury to be looking away?
Tch!?
Gwahhh!!!?
(Shide's mud flaked off--Now's the time!!!!)
Ryunosuke-san, Mio, Totsumura-san!! Any of your attacks will do!
(Land a hit where the mud flaked off!)
Ugh...! I-Impossible...!
We did it... did we do it?
*Pant, pant*... I don't know. Just in case, I'll deliver the finishing blow.
It's fine, Shin-chan. I'll do it.
You don't want to kill, do you?
...Sorry, please do.
Yeah.
Man, Shinpei-kun, I never dreamed we'd be able to take down that Shide!!
We're real Champions of Justice!!
(Nagumo-sensei… Nezu-san…)
(We defeated Shide)
(With this, we might be able to stop Haine's plan too.)
(But…)
Mio, Sou, Toki-chan... Nagumo-sensei and Nezu-san... I couldn't save them.
Sister...
S-Shinpei-kun. How about we loop right now?
We don't have any bullets, but maybe we can have Mio-chan or Ryunosuke-kun do it...
That's impossible…
W-why!?
The battle lasted longer than I expected.
Even if we loop now, we'll just return to the middle of the battle...!
It was my... mistake in judgment...
(How am I supposed to apologize to everyone...!)
Ah... ahhh.
Huh? Mio?
Shin-chan... run... away...
M-Mio-chan is turning into mud...?
H-Her shadow was stabbed! But by who...!
Shinpei-san, be careful! Shide is gone!
Huh?!
No matter how much of the future you can see, you can't dodge with that battered body, can you?
Damn it!
Ryunosuke-san!
Damn it, my body... won't move anymore...
You were worth conquering, Ryunosuke-kun.
Ugh… Ah…
Ryunosuke-san!
Sorry... sister... sorry...
N-No way...
Kukukuku. ...I'm glad the conversation was so long.
S-Shide...!? W-What's going on...!?
There are two of me inside... That was a misunderstanding from the start.
What does that mean!?
Well? How about looping and thinking about it with your favorite "big picture" view?
Though, even if you loop from now on, this outcome won't be overturned.
That... is...
That makes Shinpei-kun the final boss. It's been a long time...
(W-What should I do!?!? With just me and Totsumura-san...!)
(I-It's no good... my head isn't working...! It's no good, not anymore...!)
It's been a long time... It looks like we'll finally reach a good ending.
...Right? Shinpei-kun...
